site.title: LUALUWADIO | Handmade SheWolf Swimwear from the UK
site.description: LUALUWADIO is an independent UK label making handmade swimwear and streetwear in limited runs. Meet the SheWolf Kini, white sets cut with blood-red claw marks.

home.sub_bold: Handmade swimwear and streetwear, cut in limited runs.
home.sub_rest: LUALUWADIO is an independent UK label. The debut SheWolf Kini comes in white with blood-red claw marks, made to order and built to last.

modeling.title: THE DROP
modeling.intro: The SheWolf Kini is our first release. Each set is handmade to order in white with blood-red claw marks, sized XS to L. Runs are limited, so once a colour sells out it's gone.

gallery.alt: SheWolf Kini bikini set in white with red claw marks
gallery.caption: SHEWOLF KINI

acting.title: LOOKBOOK
acting.intro: A closer look at the cut, the ties, and the hand-finished claw marks. Every piece is sewn by hand, so small differences are part of the brand.

gallery.alt: SheWolf Kini full set flat lay
gallery.caption: THE SET

content-creation.title: THE PACK
content-creation.intro: New colours are on the way and early drops land first with the pack. Follow along and shop the latest from any of these.

about.title: ABOUT LUALUWADIO
paragraphs: LUALUWADIO is an independent label out of the UK, built around one idea: small-batch pieces that feel like armour. The SheWolf Kini is where it starts, white sets cut with blood-red claw marks and finished by hand.

Everything is made to order in limited runs, so what you get is yours and not mass-produced. New colours are coming, and the pack hears about them first. Want one? Tap through to the shop or send a message on Instagram.

guide.title: LUALUWADIO
guide.body: One label, one pack. Handmade swimwear cut for the women who run with the moon. Shop the SheWolf drop while it lasts.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: The fastest way to reach me is a DM on Instagram or a message through the Etsy shop. Questions on sizing, colours, or custom orders are all welcome.

booking.title: Get the SheWolf Kini
booking.intro: Each set is handmade to order in limited runs and sells fast. Tap through to grab yours, or message me first if you have a question.
